_metadata.description: CUDA Toolkit installation instructions by platform and version

linux_ubuntu_22.04_x86_64.label: Ubuntu 22.04 (x86_64) - Network Install
linux_ubuntu_22.04_x86_64.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

linux_ubuntu_24.04_x86_64.label: Ubuntu 24.04 (x86_64) - Network Install
linux_ubuntu_24.04_x86_64.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

linux_ubuntu_20.04_x86_64.label: Ubuntu 20.04 (x86_64) - Network Install
linux_ubuntu_20.04_x86_64.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

linux_debian_12_x86_64.label: Debian 12 (x86_64) - Network Install

linux_rhel_9_x86_64.label: RHEL 9 / Rocky 9 / AlmaLinux 9 (x86_64)
linux_rhel_9_x86_64.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

linux_fedora_39_x86_64.label: Fedora 39+ (x86_64)
linux_fedora_39_x86_64.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

linux_wsl2_ubuntu.label: WSL2 (Ubuntu) - DO NOT install driver inside WSL
prerequisites: Ensure Windows NVIDIA driver >= 570.xx is installed on the HOST
DO NOT install nvidia-driver packages inside WSL2
linux_wsl2_ubuntu.persist_env: Add the above exports to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc
linux_wsl2_ubuntu.notes: GPU driver is forwarded from Windows host. Only install the toolkit inside WSL2.

windows_10_11_x86_64.label: Windows 10/11 (x86_64) - winget
post_install: The installer automatically adds CUDA to PATH
windows_10_11_x86_64.notes: If winget is not available, download manually from the official page.

conda_any.label: Any Platform - Conda (Recommended for virtual envs)
conda_any.notes: Conda manages PATH automatically within the active environment. Best for project isolation.
